infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DreamLens uses your microphone to record your dream description immediately upon waking, before the memory fades. Recordings are transcribed on-device and not stored.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: DreamLens transcribes your spoken dream on-device so you never have to type in the dark.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: DreamLens can send you a morning reminder to log your dream before the memory fades.
